# StormCircle

> A weather social network connecting meteorologists and the public for real-time storm reporting, alerts, and community weather communication.

StormCircle combines live radar data, severe weather outlooks, and citizen reports into a single tactical map interface. Users can view real-time storm conditions, submit verified weather reports, and communicate with a community of meteorologists and weather enthusiasts.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Real-time tactical weather map with radar, storm outlooks, and citizen reports.
- [Account](/account): Operator profile, meteorologist badge application, and account settings.
